item.title: 苹果正式涨价，MacBook Pro 起售价涨至 15999 元
item.guid: 苹果正式涨价，MacBook-Pro-起售价涨至-15999-元
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Apple yesterday raised the prices of several products, including Mac, iPad, HomePod, Apple TV, and Vision Pro product lines. 据彭博社报道，苹果昨日上调多款产品价格，涉及 Mac、iPad、HomePod、Apple TV 及 Vision Pro 等产品线。

Apple stated that the rapid expansion of AI data centers has led to a surge in memory and storage demand, and the prices of related components have risen sharply in a short period, making it impossible for the company to fully absorb the cost pressure. 苹果表示，AI 数据中心快速扩张带来内存和存储需求激增，相关组件价格在短时间内大幅上涨，公司已无法继续完全消化成本压力。

The starting prices of several Apple products in the Chinese market have also been adjusted: 苹果多款产品在中国市场的起售价也已调整：

    MacBook Neo: The starting price has risen to 5499 yuan, with the original 8GB+256GB version being 4599 yuan;

    MacBook Air: The starting price has risen to 9999 yuan, with the original starting price being 8499 yuan;

    MacBook Pro: The starting price has risen to 15999 yuan, with the original starting price being 13499 yuan;

    iMac: The starting price has risen to 12499 yuan, with the original starting price being 10999 yuan;

    iPad Pro: The starting price has risen to 10799 yuan, with the original starting price being 8999 yuan;

    iPad Air: The starting price has risen to 5999 yuan, with the original starting price being 4799 yuan;

    iPad mini: The starting price has risen to 4799 yuan, with the original starting price being 3999 yuan;

    iPad Standard Edition: The starting price has risen to 3799 yuan, with the original starting price being 2999 yuan.

This price adjustment does not currently involve iPhone, Apple Watch, and AirPods. However, Apple stated that it does not rule out further price adjustments for more products in the future. 此次调价暂未涉及 iPhone、Apple Watch 和 AirPods。不过苹果方面称，未来不排除对更多产品进行价格调整。

Bloomberg mentioned that this is a rare simultaneous price increase across multiple product lines for Apple in recent years. Affected by the news, Apple's stock price once fell by 5.3% during intraday trading, the largest intraday drop in over four months. 彭博社提到，这是苹果近年来少见的跨多条产品线同步涨价。受相关消息影响，苹果股价盘中一度下跌 5.3%，为四个多月以来最大盘中跌幅。

item.title: 曝苹果折叠屏 iPhone 七月底量产，铰链问题已「大部分解决」
item.guid: 曝苹果折叠屏-iPhone-七月底量产，铰链问题已「大部分解决」
item.description:
According to South Korean electronics industry media The Elec, Apple's first foldable iPhone is scheduled to begin mass production around the end of July, and its September release is still proceeding as planned. 据韩国电子产业媒体 The Elec 报道，苹果首款折叠屏 iPhone 计划于 7 月底前后开始量产，并仍按原计划推进 9 月发布。

The report states that Apple has finalized the main specifications for this foldable iPhone, including the display, body, and structural components, and is currently entering the mass production preparation phase. The first batch of products will be produced by Foxconn, and Apple completed the first round of trial production in April. 报道称，苹果已确定这款折叠屏 iPhone 的显示屏、机身、结构件等主要规格，目前进入量产准备阶段。首批产品将由富士康负责生产，苹果已在 4 月完成第一轮试生产。

The hinge components are supplied by Taiwan's Shin Nihon Kohden and the US's Amphenol, and both companies will provide hinge modules manufactured using 3D printing. 铰链部分由中国台湾新日兴和美国安费诺供应，两家公司将提供 3D 打印方式制造的铰链模组。

It is worth mentioning that the report states Apple encountered hinge issues during development, including slight noise after millions of durability tests and increased defect rates due to larger tolerances in some assembly stages. However, these issues have now been "mostly resolved." 值得一提的是，报道称苹果在开发过程中曾遇到铰链问题，包括经历数百万次耐久测试后出现轻微噪音，以及部分组装环节公差偏大导致不良率上升。不过，相关问题目前已「大部分解决」。

item.title: 美光第三财季营收同比增长 345.7%，称存储供应紧张将延续到 2027 年后
item.guid: 美光第三财季营收同比增长-345.7%，称存储供应紧张将延续到-2027-年后
item.description:
Micron Technology yesterday released its third-quarter fiscal year 2026 results, with revenue of $41.46 billion, a year-on-year increase of 345.7%; GAAP net profit of $28.24 billion, a year-on-year increase of 1398.3%; GAAP gross margin of 84.6%, a year-on-year increase of 46.9 percentage points. After the earnings report was released, Micron's after-hours stock price once rose by over 15%. 美光科技昨日发布 2026 财年第三财季业绩，收入 414.6 亿美元，同比增长 345.7%；GAAP 净利润 282.4 亿美元，同比增长 1398.3%；GAAP 毛利率 84.6%，同比提升 46.9 个百分点。财报发布后，美光盘后股价一度涨超 15%。

    Cloud storage revenue of $13.769 billion, a year-on-year increase of 306%;

    Core data center revenue of $11.524 billion, a year-on-year increase of 653%;

    Mobile and client revenue was $11.521 billion, a year-over-year increase of 254%;

    Automotive and embedded revenue was $4.634 billion, a year-over-year increase of 311%;

    Data center SSD revenue exceeded $5 billion, doubling quarter-over-quarter;

    HBM4 shipments generated over $1 billion in revenue.

Micron expects fourth-quarter revenue of $50 billion, plus or minus $1 billion, with a GAAP gross margin of approximately 86%. The company also anticipates fourth-quarter capital expenditures of approximately $10 billion and fiscal year 2026 capital expenditures of approximately $27 billion. 美光预计第四财季收入 500 亿美元，上下浮动 10 亿美元，GAAP 毛利率约 86%。公司还预计第四财季资本支出约 100 亿美元，2026 财年资本支出约 270 亿美元。

CEO Sanjay Mehrotra stated at the earnings conference that the shortage of storage supply will take a considerable time to improve, and industry supply tightness will continue beyond 2027, possibly gradually improving in 2028 . CEO Sanjay Mehrotra 在业绩会上称， 存储供应短缺需要相当长时间改善，行业供应紧张将持续到 2027 年之后，2028 年或逐步改善 。

🔗 Related reading: Earning 26,400 yuan per second, more profitable than Nvidia, do you believe in "light"? 🔗 相关阅读： 1 秒净赚 2.64 万，比英伟达还暴利，你相信「光」吗？

item.title: OpenAI 或将 IPO 推迟到 2027 年
item.guid: OpenAI-或将-IPO-推迟到-2027-年
item.description:
According to The New York Times, OpenAI is leaning towards postponing its initial public offering until 2027. Three people involved in company discussions said that investment bankers advising OpenAI on its IPO warned that recent volatility in tech stocks, as well as stock price fluctuations after SpaceX's listing, could dampen retail investor enthusiasm for OpenAI's offering. 据《纽约时报》报道，OpenAI 正倾向于把首次公开募股推迟到 2027 年。三名参与公司讨论的人士称，给 OpenAI 提供 IPO 建议的投行人士提醒，近期科技股波动，以及 SpaceX 上市后股价波动，可能削弱散户投资者对 OpenAI 发行的热情。

The report mentioned that investment bank advisors are concerned that current market conditions may not support Sam Altman's envisioned $1 trillion valuation, leading OpenAI to prefer slowing down its IPO pace. 报道提到，投行顾问担心当前市场条件未必能支撑 Sam Altman 设想中的 1 万亿美元估值，OpenAI 因此更倾向放慢上市节奏。

item.title: 苹果 Siri AI 新增限制，明确拒绝读取网页链接内容
item.guid: 苹果-Siri-AI-新增限制，明确拒绝读取网页链接内容
item.description:
According to 9to5Mac, Apple has added a new rule to Siri AI's system prompt in iOS 27 Developer Beta 2, requiring it to explicitly inform users that it cannot access web pages and must not offer subsequent suggestions or workarounds. The specific prompt is as follows: 据 9to5Mac 报道，苹果在 iOS 27 开发者测试版 Beta 2 中，为 Siri AI 的系统提示词 (prompt) 加入了一条新规则，要求其明确告知用户无法访问网页，并且不得提供后续建议或绕过方式。具体 prompt 如下：

You cannot access the content behind a URL: When a user provides a URL and asks you to summarize, read, or extract information from it, please inform them that you cannot access web pages. Do not provide subsequent suggestions or workarounds.

The report points out that Siri AI itself could not directly access the web content behind URLs previously, but this new prompt rule further clarifies the handling method. 报道指出，Siri AI 此前本身就不能直接访问 URL 背后的网页内容，但这次新增的提示词规则进一步明确了处理方式。

Apple has not yet explained the specific reason for adding this rule. The report mentions that this adjustment may be related to the controversy over web content being directly scraped and summarized by AI chatbots: if users can get content summaries without visiting the original web page, it could reduce website traffic and affect the sustainability of the open web ecosystem. 苹果尚未说明加入这一规则的具体原因。报道提到，这一调整可能与网页内容被 AI 聊天机器人直接抓取和总结的争议有关：如果用户无需进入原网页即可获取内容摘要，可能会减少网站访问量，并影响开放网页生态的可持续性。

item.title: IBM 发布 0.7 纳米芯片技术，晶体管数量接近 1000 亿个
item.guid: IBM-发布-0.7-纳米芯片技术，晶体管数量接近-1000-亿个
item.description:
Yesterday, IBM announced its first chip technology below the 1-nanometer node, adopting a 0.7-nanometer transistor architecture based on a new three-dimensional "nanostack" architecture. IBM claims it can integrate nearly 100 billion transistors on a fingernail-sized chip, with transistor density almost double that of IBM's 2-nanometer chip released in 2021. 昨天，IBM 发布其首个低于 1 纳米节点的芯片技术，采用 0.7 纳米晶体管架构，基于新的三维「nanostack」纳米堆叠架构，IBM 称其可在指甲盖大小的芯片上集成近 1000 亿个晶体管，晶体管密度接近 2021 年发布的 IBM 2 纳米芯片的两倍。

IBM stated that this node chip is expected to deliver up to a 50% performance improvement or a 70% energy efficiency improvement compared to IBM's 2-nanometer node chip, targeting computing scenarios such as generative AI, cloud infrastructure, and next-generation electronic devices. IBM 表示，这一节点芯片相比 IBM 2 纳米节点芯片，预计最高可带来 50% 的性能提升，或 70% 的能效提升，面向生成式 AI、云基础设施和下一代电子设备等计算场景。

item.title: 曝 Google 两名 Gemini 关键研究员计划加入 Anthropic
item.guid: 曝-Google-两名-Gemini-关键研究员计划加入-Anthropic
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, two senior AI researchers from Google, a subsidiary of Alphabet, Jonas Adler and Alexander Pritzel, plan to leave and join Anthropic. 据彭博社报道，Alphabet 旗下 Google 两名资深 AI 研究人员 Jonas Adler 和 Alexander Pritzel 计划离职加入 Anthropic。

Both were considered key contributors to the Gemini AI model within Google, with Adler involved in the company's AI programming-related work and Pritzel in the AI system training process. 两人在 Google 内部被视为 Gemini AI 模型的关键贡献者，其中 Adler 参与了公司 AI 编程相关工作，Pritzel 则参与了 AI 系统训练流程。

Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis stated earlier this week that the current tech industry is in an "extremely fierce" talent competition phase, and Google still possesses "the largest and most comprehensive research team." Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis 本周早些时候表示，当前科技行业正处于「极其激烈」的人才竞争阶段，Google 仍拥有「规模最大、覆盖最广的研究团队」。

Bloomberg also mentioned that Anthropic has continuously attracted talent from Google DeepMind in recent years. In addition to competition in foundational models, Anthropic is also exploring application areas such as life sciences and healthcare. Regarding the whereabouts of Adler, Pritzel, and others, Google and Anthropic have not yet provided further responses. 彭博社还提到，Anthropic 近年持续从 Google DeepMind 吸引人才。除基础模型竞争外，Anthropic 也在探索生命科学和医疗健康等应用方向。对于 Adler、Pritzel 等人的去向，Google 和 Anthropic 暂未给出进一步回应。

item.title: Kimi B 端业务负责人：要与 OpenAI 等头部模型公司竞争
item.guid: Kimi-B-端业务负责人：要与-OpenAI-等头部模型公司竞争
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, Huang Zhenxin, head of Moonshot AI's B-side business, revealed at the Amazon Web Services China Summit that Kimi's enterprise business proportion is continuously increasing, with industries such as internet, finance, manufacturing, education, and healthcare becoming important sources of enterprise clients, and overseas business is also growing rapidly. 据界面新闻报道，月之暗面 B 端业务负责人黄震昕在亚马逊云科技中国峰会上透露，Kimi 的企业业务占比正在持续提升，互联网、金融、制造、教育、医疗等行业已经成为重要企业客户来源，海外业务也在快速增长。

Huang Zhenxin stated that Moonshot AI currently has a staff of just over 300 people, and the highest priority for resource allocation remains at the model research and development level. The company hopes to continue exploring the limits of intelligence and compete with leading overseas model companies such as OpenAI, Google, and Anthropic. 黄震昕称，月之暗面目前员工规模只有 300 多人，资源配置的最高优先级仍在模型研发层。公司希望继续探索智能上限，并与 OpenAI、Google、Anthropic 等海外头部模型公司竞争。

On the commercialization front, he mentioned that users are willing to pay a premium for high-performance tokens, and model vendors are also reducing actual costs through methods such as cache hit rate optimization and inference optimization. Currently, the cache hit rate for Kimi's original services has exceeded 90%. 在商业化层面，他提到，用户对高性能 Token 有溢价支付意愿，模型厂商也在通过 Cache 命中率优化和推理优化等方式降低实际成本。目前 Kimi 原厂服务的 Cache 命中率已经超过 90%。

item.title: 一汽-大众更换商品经营部负责人，国桐从深蓝回归
item.guid: 一汽-大众更换商品经营部负责人，国桐从深蓝回归
item.description:
According to a report by Auto Pixel yesterday, FAW-Volkswagen's Product Operations Department, established about a year ago, recently saw a change in leadership, with Guo Tong, former Chief Brand Officer of Deepal Auto, taking over as its head. This department is often referred to internally as the "Product Department," and was newly established in the first half of last year, subsequently being upgraded to an L1-level department. 据汽车像素昨日报道，一汽-大众成立约一年的商品经营部近日换帅，原深蓝汽车首席品牌官国桐出任该部门负责人。该部门在内部常被称为「产品部」，去年上半年新设，随后升为 L1 级部门。

Guo Tong previously worked in FAW-Volkswagen's South China, South Region Sales Division, and Marketing and Derivatives Department, then joined the Changan system, serving as Chief Brand Officer for Deepal Auto since 2022. The report states that FAW-Volkswagen's hiring logic this time is to bring back individuals familiar with the old system who have also participated in the development of independent new energy brands. 国桐曾在一汽-大众华南区、南区销售事业部、市场与衍生业务部任职，之后进入长安体系，并从 2022 年起担任深蓝汽车首席品牌官。报道称，一汽-大众此次用人逻辑是找回熟悉旧体系、又参与过自主新能源品牌建设的人。

item.title: 中汽协：5 月中国品牌乘用车销量占比升至 75%
item.guid: 中汽协：5-月中国品牌乘用车销量占比升至-75%
item.description:
According to statistics from the China Association of Automobile Manufacturers, in May 2026, sales of Chinese brand passenger vehicles reached 1.689 million units, a month-on-month increase of 5.7% and a year-on-year increase of 4.2%, accounting for 75% of total passenger vehicle sales. Their market share increased by 6 percentage points compared to the same period last year. 据中国汽车工业协会统计，2026 年 5 月，中国品牌乘用车销售 168.9 万辆，环比增长 5.7%，同比增长 4.2%，占乘用车销售总量的 75%，销量占有率比去年同期提升 6 个百分点。

From January to May this year, cumulative sales of Chinese brand passenger vehicles reached 7.326 million units, a year-on-year decrease of 3.1%, accounting for 71% of total passenger vehicle sales. Their market share increased by 2.2 percentage points year-on-year. 今年 1-5 月，中国品牌乘用车累计销售 732.6 万辆，同比下降 3.1%，占乘用车销售总量的 71%，销量占有率同比提升 2.2 个百分点。

During the same period, the overall automotive market remained under pressure. In May, automobile production and sales were 2.616 million and 2.629 million units respectively, down 1.2% and 2.1% year-on-year; new energy vehicle production and sales were 1.554 million and 1.496 million units respectively, up 22.4% and 14.4% year-on-year; automobile exports reached 930,000 units, up 68.7% year-on-year. 同期汽车市场整体仍承压。5 月汽车产销分别为 261.6 万辆和 262.9 万辆，同比分别下降 1.2% 和 2.1%；新能源汽车产销分别为 155.4 万辆和 149.6 万辆，同比分别增长 22.4% 和 14.4%；汽车出口 93 万辆，同比增长 68.7%。

item.title: 携程第一财季营收 162.08 亿元，归母净利润同比下降 41.57%
item.guid: 携程第一财季营收-162.08-亿元，归母净利润同比下降-41.57%
item.description:
Trip.com Group announced its unaudited financial results for the first quarter of 2026. During the period, the company's net operating revenue was RMB 16.2 billion, a year-on-year increase of 17%; net profit attributable to Trip.com Group shareholders was RMB 2.5 billion, lower than RMB 4.3 billion in the same period last year; adjusted EBITDA was RMB 4.8 billion, compared to RMB 4.2 billion in the same period last year. 携程集团发布 2026 年第一季度未经审计财务业绩。期内，公司净营业收入为 162 亿元，同比增长 17%；归属于携程集团股东的净利润为 25 亿元，低于去年同期的 43 亿元；经调整 EBITDA 为 48 亿元，去年同期为 42 亿元。

    Accommodation reservation operating revenue was RMB 6.5 billion, a year-on-year increase of 17%;

    Transportation ticketing operating revenue was RMB 6.1 billion, a year-on-year increase of 12%;

    Packaged tour operating revenue was RMB 1.1 billion, a year-on-year increase of 19%;

    Corporate travel management operating revenue was RMB 690 million, a year-on-year increase of 20%.

The financial report shows that Trip.com Group's operating costs for the first quarter were RMB 3.3 billion, a year-on-year increase of 23%; product development expenses were RMB 4.1 billion, a year-on-year increase of 15%; sales and marketing expenses were RMB 3.7 billion, a year-on-year increase of 25%; and general and administrative expenses were RMB 1.1 billion, a year-on-year increase of 8%. 财报显示，携程集团第一季度营业成本为人民币 33 亿元，同比增长 23%；产品研发费用为人民币 41 亿元，同比增长 15%；销售及营销费用为人民币 37 亿元，同比增长 25%；一般及行政费用为人民币 11 亿元，同比增长 8%。

item.title: 交通运输部等部门印发「人工智能+交通运输」行动方案
item.guid: 交通运输部等部门印发「人工智能+交通运输」行动方案
item.description:
Seven departments, including the Ministry of Transport, yesterday issued the "Innovation Action Plan for Typical Application Scenarios of 'AI+Transportation'," proposing that by the end of 2027, AI will achieve large-scale innovative applications in typical transportation scenarios, and a batch of replicable and scalable application cases will be formed. 交通运输部等七部门昨日印发《「人工智能+交通运输」典型应用场景创新行动方案》，提出到 2027 年底，人工智能在交通运输典型场景中实现规模化创新应用，并形成一批可复制、可推广的应用案例。

The plan lists several key directions: 方案列出多个重点方向：

    Intelligent Driving: Conduct "end-to-end" large model research and development and testing, promoting scenario verification for intelligent connected vehicles, autonomous taxis, and autonomous buses.

    Smart Logistics: Promote the implementation of scenarios such as unmanned delivery, automated warehousing, and intelligent dispatching for ports and airports.

    Integrated Transportation Governance: Explore applications such as large transportation models, road network operation monitoring, emergency response, travel services, and industry supervision.

item.title: 蚂蚁阿福上线「科学减重 1 亿斤」行动
item.guid: 蚂蚁阿福上线「科学减重-1-亿斤」行动
item.description:
Yesterday, Ant Afu officially launched the "Scientific Weight Loss of 100 Million Jin" health initiative, opening up an entry point for users to claim body fat scales on the Afu App. After completing the specified process, users can effectively receive a body fat scale for 0.01 yuan + 9.9 yuan shipping fee. 昨天，蚂蚁阿福正式发起「科学减重 1 亿斤」健康行动，并在阿福 App 开放体脂秤领取入口。用户完成指定流程后相当于以 0.01 元 + 9.9 元运费领取体脂秤。

The Afu App has also upgraded its AI interpretation function, which can generate summaries based on user body data and provide key areas of concern, dietary and exercise recommendations, and action reminders. 阿福 App 此次还升级了 AI 解读功能，可基于用户身体数据生成小结，并给出重点关注事项、饮食运动建议和行动提醒。

item.title: 💡 李飞飞：10 年后，职场或只剩两类工作者
item.guid: 💡-李飞飞：10-年后，职场或只剩两类工作者
item.description:
In a recent Silicon Valley Girl interview, Li Feifei, a member of the U.S. National Academy of Engineering and founder of World Labs, stated that in the face of technology with rapidly improving cognitive abilities, what individuals most need to cultivate is "agency," which is the ability to actively understand, use, and master tools. 在日前的 Silicon Valley Girl 访谈中，美国国家工程院院士、World Labs 创始人李飞飞围绕 AI 对未来职场的影响表示，面对一种认知能力快速提升的技术，个人最需要培养的是「agency」，即主动理解、使用并驾驭工具的能力。

She believes that AI should not be simply regarded as a technology that replaces humans, but rather a powerful tool that needs to be learned, designed, and constrained by humans. 她认为，AI 不应被简单视为取代人类的技术，而是一种需要被人类学习、设计和约束的强大工具。

I believe entrepreneurial is largely synonymous with agency. In the face of such a cognitively powerful technology, agency is key.

When discussing the form of companies in the next 10 years, Li Feifei cited product managers as an example, stating that in the past, product managers typically needed to coordinate among users, markets, designers, and engineers, and completing a prototype could take several months; 在谈到未来 10 年的公司形态时，李飞飞以产品经理为例称，过去产品经理通常需要在用户、市场、设计师和工程师之间协调，完成一个原型可能需要数月；

Now, some product managers can use AI to complete preliminary design and code writing, shortening the cycle from idea to feedback. She emphasized that this does not mean designers and engineers will be replaced, but rather gives them the opportunity to engage in more complex work. 现在，部分产品经理已经可以借助 AI 完成初步设计和代码编写，缩短从想法到反馈的周期。她强调，这并不意味着设计师和工程师会被取代，而是让他们有机会投入更复杂的工作。

During the interview, MasterClass CEO David Rogier summarized this change as the "barbell effect" in the workplace: one end consists of top professionals with extremely strong abilities in a specific field, and the other end consists of highly proactive generalists who can complete multiple types of tasks with the help of AI. 访谈中，MasterClass CEO David Rogier 将这一变化概括为职场的「杠铃效应」：一端是某一领域能力极强的顶尖专业人士，另一端是能够借助 AI 完成多类任务的高主动性通才。

Li Feifei agreed with this, adding that whether one is in the position of an expert or a generalist, the core lies in whether one possesses the ability to actively use tools, form judgments, and creatively solve problems. 李飞飞对此表示认同，并补充称，无论处在专家还是通才的位置，核心都在于是否具备主动使用工具、形成判断并创造性解决问题的能力。

item.title: 中兴高管：新一代 AI 手机近期上市，将推动 AI 能力走向端侧
item.guid: 中兴高管：新一代-AI-手机近期上市，将推动-AI-能力走向端侧
item.description:
According to Guancha.cn, the 17th Annual Meeting of the New Champions of the World Economic Forum was held in Dalian from June 23 to 25. Fang Rong, Chairman of ZTE, stated at the "AI and Future Growth" luncheon that ZTE's new generation of AI phones will be launched soon, which is an important step for the company to push intelligent capabilities from the cloud to the edge. 据观察者网报道，6 月 23 日至 25 日，世界经济论坛第十七届新领军者年会在大连举行。中兴通讯董事长方榕在「AI 与未来增长」午餐会上表示，中兴通讯新一代 AI 手机即将在近期上市，这是公司将智能能力从云端推向端侧的重要一步。

Fang Rong stated that the ultimate meaning of AI is to make technology universally beneficial to the economy and society. The report said that this new generation of AI phones will provide an interactive experience that "understands and gets things done," and is considered one of ZTE's products to promote terminal ecosystem growth. 方榕称，AI 的终极意义在于让科技普惠经济社会。报道称，这款新一代 AI 手机将提供「听得懂、能干活」的交互体验，并被视为中兴通讯推动终端生态增长的产品之一。

Regarding the technical path, ZTE stated that the company deeply integrates AI agents into the operating system, aiming to create a native AI experience rather than simple functional plugins. 在技术路径上，中兴通讯称，公司将 AI 智能体深度融入操作系统，目标是打造原生 AI 体验，而非简单的功能插件。

The company also mentioned that it is currently further upgrading system-level AI capabilities and integrating its self-developed Co Claw intelligent scheduling technology to support cross-application, cross-ecosystem collaboration, and automated task execution in more complex scenarios. 公司还提到，当前正进一步升级系统级 AI 能力，并融合自研 Co Claw 智能调度技术，以支持跨应用、跨生态协同，以及更复杂场景下的自动化任务执行。

item.title: 企业微信 5.0.9 升级 AI 服务总结，智能助理「大圆」进入内测
item.guid: 企业微信-5.0.9-升级-AI-服务总结，智能助理「大圆」进入内测
item.description:
WeChat Work yesterday released its 5.0.9 version update, adding multiple AI capabilities covering customer service, smart forms, smart documents, and meeting minutes. 企业微信昨日发布 5.0.9 版本更新，新增多项 AI 能力，覆盖客户服务、智能表格、智能文档和会议记录。

  • For sales, customer service, and operations teams, WeChat Work launched the "Service Summary" feature. 面向销售、客服和运营团队，企业微信推出「服务总结」功能。
  • The "AI Fields" in smart forms have added two types of batch processing capabilities: batch extraction of information from files and batch image processing; 智能表格的「AI 字段」增加从文件中批量提取信息和批量处理图片两类批处理能力；
  • Smart documents now include new features such as directories, text selection comments, flowcharts, mind maps, and card styles. 智能文档新增目录、划词评论、流程图、思维导图和卡片样式。
  • The previously launched "Record Face-to-Face Chat" is integrated with the calendar, automatically reminding users to record face-to-face chats when an event starts, and summarizing past created and participated face-to-face chat records on the workbench. 此前上线的「记录面聊」则与日程打通，可在日程开始时自动提醒记录面聊，并在工作台汇总过往创建和参与过的面聊记录。

In addition, WeChat Work's first native AI intelligent assistant, "Dayuan," has started internal testing. It can be activated via a sidebar handle or shortcut keys, and is used for summarizing chats, reading and writing document tables, and summarizing project progress. 此外，企业微信首次推出的原生 AI 智能助理「大圆」已开启内测，可通过贴边把手或快捷键唤起，用于总结聊天、读写文档表格和汇总项目进展。

item.title: Google 将 Computer Use 内置进 Gemini 3.5 Flash
item.guid: Google-将-Computer-Use-内置进-Gemini-3.5-Flash
item.description:
Google announced the computer use capability of Gemini 3.5 Flash. The official blog shows that computer use is now a built-in tool supported by Gemini 3.5 Flash, whereas previously this capability was primarily provided through a separate Gemini 2.5 computer use model. Google 发布 Gemini 3.5 Flash 的 computer use 能力。官方博客显示，computer use 现在是 Gemini 3.5 Flash 支持的内置工具，而此前该能力主要通过单独的 Gemini 2.5 computer use 模型提供。

The Computer Use tool allows developers to build browser, mobile, and desktop control agents. The model understands the screen through screenshots and generates UI operations such as mouse clicks and keyboard input; the client still needs to implement an execution environment to receive and perform these actions. Computer Use 工具可让开发者构建浏览器、移动端和桌面控制智能体。模型通过截图理解屏幕，并生成鼠标点击、键盘输入等 UI 操作；客户端仍需实现执行环境来接收并执行这些动作。

item.title: 影石回应 Luna Ultra 国补「骗补」质疑：品牌补贴保障统一到手价
item.guid: 影石回应-Luna-Ultra-国补「骗补」质疑：品牌补贴保障统一到手价
item.description:
According to reports from Southern Metropolis Daily and Times Weekly, Insta360 recently sparked controversy over the price and subsidy rules of its first dual-camera gimbal camera, Luna Ultra. 据《南方都市报》、《时代周报》消息，影石 Insta360 近日因首款双摄云台相机 Luna Ultra 的价格和补贴规则引发争议。

The product was released on June 10th. The launch event and some official promotional images showed the standard package starting at 3999 yuan. However, some consumers found that certain online channels required claiming a 15% government subsidy to reach the 3999 yuan final price, while some offline stores could be purchased for 3999 yuan without using the national subsidy. 该产品于 6 月 10 日发布，发布会及部分官方宣传图显示标准套餐售价 3999 元起，但有消费者发现，部分线上渠道需领取 15% 政府补贴后才能达到 3999 元到手价，而部分线下门店无需使用国补即可按 3999 元购买。

Other online pages show that the price of the relevant product is approximately 4729 yuan when the national subsidy is not claimed. Consumers have therefore questioned the inconsistency in the product's online and offline pricing rules, which may occupy consumer subsidy quotas. 另有线上页面显示，未领取国补时，相关商品价格约为 4729 元。有消费者因此质疑该产品线上线下标价规则不一致，可能占用消费者补贴名额。

Regarding the "fraudulent national subsidy" allegations, sources close to Insta360 told Southern Metropolis Daily that Luna Ultra falls within the scope of national subsidy applications and is eligible for national subsidies in some channels. 针对「骗取国补」质疑，接近影石人士向《南方都市报》表示，Luna Ultra 属于国家补贴申请范围，并在部分渠道具备国补资格。

Due to differences in the pace of policy implementation across regions, Insta360 has also launched a limited-time brand subsidy promotion to ensure that online and offline consumers nationwide can enjoy a unified discounted price of 3999 yuan, and there is no situation of fraudulent or illegal use of subsidies. 由于各地政策落地节奏存在差异，影石同时推出品牌补贴限时优惠活动，以保障全国线上线下消费者可享受 3999 元统一到手优惠价，不存在骗补或违规使用补贴的情况。

item.title: IDC：一季度全球手持智能相机出货量同比增长 33%，大疆和影石占据前二
item.guid: IDC：一季度全球手持智能相机出货量同比增长-33%，大疆和影石占据前二
item.description:
Market research firm IDC yesterday released the "Q1 2026 Global Handheld Smart Camera Market Tracking Report": 市场调研机构 IDC 昨日发布《2026 年第一季度全球手持智能相机市场跟踪报告》：

In the first quarter of this year, global handheld smart camera shipments reached 4.14 million units, a year-on-year increase of 33%; sales exceeded 10.5 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 20%.

In the segmented market: 细分市场中：

    Action camera shipments approached 2.01 million units, a year-on-year increase of 39%;

    Gimbal camera shipments increased by over 18% year-on-year;

    Panoramic camera shipments exceeded 500,000 units, a year-on-year increase of over 55%.

Regarding manufacturers: 厂商方面：

    DJI maintained its first-place position with a 65% share of shipments, an increase of 3 percentage points year-on-year;

    Insta360 ranked second with a 22% share, growing by 66% year-on-year, leading in growth rate;

    GoPro's share was approximately 6%, with shipments decreasing by 33% year-on-year.

The report states that China contributed over half of the market share in 2025, and this trend continued to strengthen in Q1 2026. IDC expects the global handheld smart camera market size to exceed 40 million units by 2030, with a five-year compound annual growth rate of nearly 18%. 报告称，中国贡献了 2025 年超过一半的市场份额，2026 年一季度这一趋势继续增强。IDC 预计，到 2030 年，全球手持智能相机市场规模将超过 4000 万台，五年复合增长率接近 18%。

item.title: 哥斯达黎加咖啡收成降至 55 年低点，同比减少 12%
item.guid: 哥斯达黎加咖啡收成降至-55-年低点，同比减少-12%
item.description:
According to Reuters, Costa Rica's coffee institute Icafe disclosed that Costa Rica's 2025-2026 coffee harvest decreased by 12% year-on-year, reaching its lowest level in 55 years. Official data shows that coffee growers delivered 1.592 million bags of coffee cherries this season, each weighing 46 kg; the previous season was 1.813 million bags. 据路透社报道，哥斯达黎加咖啡研究所 Icafe 披露，哥斯达黎加 2025-2026 年度咖啡收成同比下降 12%，创下 55 年来最低水平。官方数据显示，本季咖啡种植者交付的咖啡果折合 159.2 万袋，每袋 46 公斤；上一季为 181.3 万袋。

Marco Araya, head of Icafe's economic research and market department, stated that the last time there was a lower harvest was in the 1970-1971 season. Icafe 经济研究与市场部门负责人 Marco Araya 表示，上一次出现更低收成还要追溯到 1970-1971 年度。

The agency stated that this season's production decrease was mainly affected by factors such as irregular rainfall, labor shortages, the biennial production cycle of coffee crops, and economic pressures faced by producers, including pressure from local currency depreciation. 该机构称，本季减产主要受到降雨不规律、劳动力短缺、咖啡作物两年生产周期，以及生产者面临的经济压力等因素影响，其中包括本币贬值带来的压力。

item.title: 《小黄人大眼萌 3》开启预售，7 月 3 日上映
item.guid: 《小黄人大眼萌-3》开启预售，7-月-3-日上映
item.description:
"Minions 3 / Minions and the Big Monster" has announced the start of pre-sales and will officially be released on July 3rd, two days later than the North American market. 《小黄人大眼萌 3 / 小黄人与大怪兽》已宣布开启预售，并将于 7 月 3 日正式上映，较北美市场晚两天。

The film features three new protagonist Minions, with the story set in 1920s Hollywood, revolving around the Minions pursuing their dreams in the entertainment industry. The Minions work as extras on set and simultaneously hope to film a monster movie, encountering multiple large monsters in the process. 该片此次更换了三名新的主角小黄人，故事设定在 1920 年代的好莱坞，围绕小黄人们逐梦演艺圈展开。小黄人们在片场打工担任群演，同时希望拍摄一部怪兽电影，过程中遭遇了多只大怪兽。

item.title: DC 将推出《蝙蝠侠：骑士陨落》动画电影三部曲
item.guid: DC-将推出《蝙蝠侠：骑士陨落》动画电影三部曲
item.description:
DC Studios announced that it will adapt the classic comic "Batman: Knightfall" into an animated film trilogy and released the first teaser trailer. The first part, "Batman: Knightfall Part One," is scheduled to be released in 2026. DC Studios 宣布将把经典漫画《蝙蝠侠：骑士陨落》改编为动画电影三部曲，并发布首支先导预告。第一部《Batman: Knightfall Part One》计划于 2026 年上线。

"Knightfall" is an important story in the 1990s DC Batman main storyline, where Bane defeats Bruce Wayne and breaks his spine, after which Jean-Paul Valley briefly takes on the mantle of Batman. This story previously influenced film and television adaptations such as "The Dark Knight Rises." 《骑士陨落》是 1990 年代 DC 蝙蝠侠主线中的重要故事，贝恩在这一篇章中击败布鲁斯·韦恩并折断他的脊椎，之后 Jean-Paul Valley 一度接过蝙蝠侠身份。这个故事此前曾影响《蝙蝠侠：黑暗骑士崛起》等影视改编。

This trilogy will fully adapt the chapter in animated form, continuing DC's recent approach of revisiting classic comic events through animated films. 这次三部曲将以动画形式完整改编该篇章，延续 DC 近年通过动画电影重访经典漫画事件的路线。
